name: figma-to-lwc-plugin
description: Figma plugin for generating and previewing Salesforce LWC code from components.

scripts.compile: esbuild src/code.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/code.js && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('src/ui.html', 'dist/ui.html');"
